arts.ttl: Mathys Tel 'chooses next club' with Man United, Arsenal, Chelsea 'all battling' for Bayern Munich man
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel reportedly signals that he wants to join Manchester United in the latter stages of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City need 'pick me up' after damaging week
arts.sum: After a week to forget for Manchester City, manager Gareth Taylor admits they need a "pick me up".

arts.ttl: Gabriel sparks Erling Haaland tensions with heated goal celebration
arts.sum: Gabriel celebrated by shouting into Haaland’s face as Arsenal took an early lead at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel clashes with Erling Haaland AGAIN after 'stay humble' jibe
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard's goal saw Gabriel Magalhaes enjoy his own celebration on the halfway line as he taunted Erling Haaland when the Gunners took the lead after just two minutes

arts.ttl: Tel prefers Man Utd move but Arsenal still in race - Sky Germany
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel's preference is to join Manchester United before the transfer deadline, reports Sky in Germany.

arts.ttl: Concrete negotiations underway: Arsenal target has opted to join Man United
arts.sum: Bayern Munich attacker Mathys Tel has been linked with a move to the Premier League in recent weeks, and the player has now decided to join Manchester United. According to Sky Sports Germany journalist Florian Plettenberg, the player has agreed to join the Old Trafford outfit and concrete negotiations are underway between all parties to […] The post Concrete negotiations underway: Arsenal target has opted to join Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man City interested in signing Porto's Gonzalez
arts.sum: Sources in Portugal say City have already had a bid turned down for the 23-year-old former Barcelona player.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry reveals what has 'hurt' Mikel Arteta the most in worrying Arsenal verdict
arts.sum: Arsenal looked certain to win the Premier League in 2022-23 after racking up an eight-point lead over Manchester City with ten points to go, only to suffer a collapse as Pep Guardiola's men overtook them
Arsenal host Manchester City in a clash that always promises excitement. Follow ESPN for all the action.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel agrees to join Man Utd but Arsenal still keen
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Tel has now agreed to join Man Utd and concrete negotiations between the Red Devils and Bayern are taking place. Mathys Tel agrees to join Man Utd but Arsenal still keen
